summary: Xenia MVP first-run test. Backend + frontend cinematic experience validated end-to-end. All 5 pytest backend cases and all requested UI checks pass. No console errors during full-page scroll and form submission.

issues: HUD act label lags the visible section by ~1-2 acts near the end of the scroll (at 85% scroll HUD shows 'Act 05 Personalisation' while Act VII - Scale is fully in view; at 95% HUD shows 'Act 06 The Agency' while RequestAccess is centred). Acceptance criteria are met (label advances past 'The Noise' toward 'Discovery' at ~50%), but end-of-scroll alignment feels ~1 slot behind. Consider mapping act index to the currently in-view section rather than raw scroll fraction, or advancing the divisor so the HUD reaches Act 07 by ~90%.

action_items: (Optional polish) Align CommandCentre act index with the section currently in the viewport - at the end of the scroll the HUD trails the visible act by 1-2 slots.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/access lowercases + strips email before insert (good) and returns existing record on duplicate (idempotent) - correct behaviour.
server.py: _id is properly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} in both GET /api/access and GET /api/status - no ObjectId serialisation risk.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') - FastAPI recommends lifespan handlers. Non-blocking.
Experience.jsx: scroll->act mapping uses floor(rawIndex) - 1 which under-shoots at the tail (HUD offset issue above). Minor UX polish.
RequestAccess.jsx: Good - uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, has data-testid on all interactive nodes, HTML5 email validation blocks bad submits before the API call, confirmation state renders on success.
seed_data_creation: test_* prefixed AccessRequest rows inserted into MongoDB test_database.access_requests during pytest and Playwright runs. These are harmless; the collection is used solely for lead capture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api. Endpoints: GET /api/, POST /api/access (idempotent by lowercased email), GET /api/access. Frontend is scroll-driven: use window.scrollTo({top: N, behavior: 'instant'}) to advance acts, do NOT expect buttons for navigation. Key data-testids: xn-nav, hero, hero-signal-counter, command-centre, act-1..act-7, intel-card-3-0, email-preview-4, approve-4/revise-4, request-access, access-email, access-role, access-submit, access-confirmation. Sonner toast fires on successful POST. HTML5 email validation blocks invalid input client-side before the API call. Ignore Compilation.assets webpack deprecation warning.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs blocking acceptance criteria. Sole observation is a cosmetic HUD/section offset near end of scroll caused by (Math.floor(p * (TOTAL_SCENES-1)) - 1) mapping in Experience.jsx line 55-57.
